title: malaxis nervosa
intro: Malaxis nervosa, also known as the nervous adder's mouth or hooded orchid, is a species of orchid native to North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic and sedative effects, which can help to ease muscle cramps, anxiety, and insomnia. The health benefits of Malaxis nervosa include reducing stress, promoting relaxation, and improving sleep quality. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve drying the leaves and roots, which can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for topical or internal use.
